title: CSS random()
summary: Safari recently implemented a non-standard (yet?) CSS random() function (currently only in WebKit, and not yet part of any CSS specification). title: Connecting to the PassKit API with Ruby
summary: We were recently testing PassKit as a way of managing membership cards for giving societies.
